## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Type

- [ ] Prompt improvement (`PROMPT.md`)
- [ ] Bank format notes
- [ ] New / edited guide (`src/data/posts.ts`)
- [ ] Site (design / a11y / perf / SEO)
- [ ] New visualization idea
- [ ] Bug fix / docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No real financial data committed (only fictional/redacted examples)
- [ ] Screenshots attached for visual changes
